name_en: 🧡BV True Love Black and White Panda 15-grid, this is my favorite BV bag this year. Canvas with sheepskin, black and white color scheme is simply beautiful to my heart. Continuing BV's signature weaving elements, minimalist style, no flashy decorations, very versatile and stylish~ Perfect for daily use to carry phone, lipstick, car keys, etc.
